---
title: "Articles"
listing:
  contents:
    - title: "Support for abolishing ICE reaches 50%"
      path: https://yougov.com/en-us/articles/54225-support-for-abolishing-ice-reaches-50-percent-february-27-march-2-2026-economist-yougov-poll
      image: https://ygo-assets-websites-editorial-emea.yougov.net/original_images/ICE_GettyImages-2260106243_copy.jpeg
      date: "2026-03-03T18:26:10.051678Z"
      categories: [Polling, Politics, Immigration, ICE]
      
    - title: "Few Americans support U.S. military action against Iran, but a majority think it's likely"
      path: https://today.yougov.com/politics/articles/54158-few-americans-support-usa-military-action-against-iran-majority-think-it-is-likely-february-20-23-2026-economist-yougov-poll
      image: https://ygo-assets-websites-editorial-emea.yougov.net/images/Iran_photo_GettyImages-2262302141_copy.original.jpg?pw=1200
      date: "2026-02-24T20:20:18.655331Z"
      categories: [Polling, Politics, Foreign policy, Military]
      
    - title: "Americans are divided about the state of race relations and how successful the civil rights movement has been"
      path: https://today.yougov.com/politics/articles/54159-americans-divided-about-state-of-race-relations-how-successful-civil-rights-movement-has-been-february-20-23-2026-economist-yougov-poll
      image: https://ygo-assets-websites-editorial-emea.yougov.net/images/Jackson_GettyImages-153856777_copy.original.jpg?pw=1200
      date: "2026-02-24T20:13:23.989472Z"
      categories: [Polling, Politics, Race]
      
    - title: "Many Americans like the concept of TrumpRx, but the name turns off some of them"
      path: https://today.yougov.com/politics/articles/54126-many-americans-like-the-concept-of-trumprx-but-the-name-turns-off-some-of-them
      image: https://ygo-assets-websites-editorial-emea.yougov.net/images/GettyImages-2260134571.original.jpg?pw=1200
      date: "2026-02-17T23:06:06.081816Z"
      categories: [Polling, Experiments, Politics]
      
    - title: "By a two-to-one margin, Americans approve of ending the immigration enforcement surge in Minnesota"
      path: https://today.yougov.com/politics/articles/54120-by-two-to-one-margin-americans-approve-ending-immigration-enforcement-surge-in-minnesota-february-13-16-2026-economist-yougov-poll
      image: https://ygo-assets-websites-editorial-emea.yougov.net/images/ICE_GettyImages-2261279822_copy.original.jpg?pw=1200
      date: "2026-02-17T20:42:35.288982Z"
      categories: [Polling, Politics, Immigration, ICE]
      
    - title: "Most Americans say AI will reduce the number of jobs in the U.S."
      path: https://today.yougov.com/technology/articles/54123-most-americans-say-ai-artificial-intelligence-will-reduce-number-jobs-in-us-united-states-february-13-16-2026-economist-yougov-poll
      image: https://ygo-assets-websites-editorial-emea.yougov.net/images/AI_GettyImages-2235804670_copy.original.jpg?pw=1200
      date: "2026-02-17T21:06:20.303500Z"
      categories: [Polling, Politics, AI]
      
    - title: "Nearly half of Americans think they'll see catastrophic impacts of climate change in their lifetimes"
      path: https://today.yougov.com/politics/articles/54124-nearly-half-americans-think-they-will-see-catastrophic-impacts-climate-change-in-their-lifetimes-february-13-16-2026-economist-yougov-poll
      image: https://ygo-assets-websites-editorial-emea.yougov.net/images/coal_GettyImages-2261166764_copy.original.jpg?pw=1200
      date: "2026-02-17T21:11:56.085628Z"
      categories: [Polling, Politics, Climate]
      
    - title: "Today more Americans support than oppose abolishing ICE"
      path: https://today.yougov.com/politics/articles/53939-more-americans-support-than-oppose-abolishing-ice-immigration-minneapolis-shooting-poll
      image: https://ygo-assets-websites-editorial-emea.yougov.net/images/ICE_GettyImages-2257949562_copy.original.jpg?pw=1200
      date: "2026-01-26T00:50:42.584451Z"
      categories: [Polling, Politics, Immigration, ICE]
      
    - title: "Many Americans support Iranian protesters but few want U.S. military involvement in Iran"
      path: https://today.yougov.com/international/articles/53927-many-americans-support-iranian-protesters-but-few-want-us-military-involvement-in-iran
      image: https://ygo-assets-websites-editorial-emea.yougov.net/images/GettyImages-2256429138.original.jpg?pw=1200
      date: "2026-01-21T16:05:43.995543Z"
      categories: [Polling, Politics, Foreign policy, Military]
      
    - title: "Most Americans remain opposed to seizing Greenland with military force"
      path: https://today.yougov.com/politics/articles/53897-most-americans-remain-opposed-to-seizing-greenland-with-military-force
      image: https://ygo-assets-websites-editorial-emea.yougov.net/images/GettyImages-2207639157.original.jpg?pw=1200
      date: "2026-01-15T16:33:20.186745Z"
      categories: [Polling, Politics, Greenland, Foreign policy, Military]
      
    - title: "After the shooting in Minneapolis, majorities of Americans view ICE unfavorably and support major changes to the agency"
      author: with Taylor Orth
      path: https://today.yougov.com/politics/articles/53892-after-the-shooting-in-minneapolis-majorities-of-americans-view-ice-unfavorably-and-support-major-changes-to-the-agency
      image: https://ygo-assets-websites-editorial-emea.yougov.net/images/GettyImages-2256091466.original.jpg?pw=1200
      date: "2026-01-14T19:03:00.770699Z"
      categories: [Polling, Politics, Immigration, ICE]
      
    - title: "Only one-third of Americans support eliminating dual citizenship"
      path: https://today.yougov.com/politics/articles/53679-only-one-third-of-americans-support-eliminating-dual-citizenship
      image: https://ygo-assets-websites-editorial-emea.yougov.net/images/GettyImages-2222849912.original.jpg?pw=1200
      date: "2025-12-08T15:29:30.828789Z"
      categories: [Polling, Experiments, Immigration, Politics]
      
    - title: "Americans contemplate a post-penny future"
      path: https://today.yougov.com/economy/articles/53656-americans-contemplate-a-post-penny-future
      image: https://ygo-assets-websites-editorial-emea.yougov.net/images/GettyImages-2245829889.original.jpg?pw=1200
      date: "2025-12-05T20:46:24.553177Z"
      categories: [Polling, Politics, Money]
      
    - title: "Majorities of Americans disapprove of ICE and say the agency mistreats citizens and immigrants"
      path: https://today.yougov.com/politics/articles/53394-majorities-of-americans-disapprove-of-ice
      image: https://ygo-assets-websites-editorial-emea.yougov.net/images/GettyImages-2239242020.original.jpg?pw=1200
      date: "2025-11-14T19:29:34.425729Z"
      categories: [Polling, Experiments, Politics, Immigration, ICE]
      
    - title: "The U.S. Navy deployment near Venezuela has become even less popular in the past month"
      author: with Taylor Orth
      path: https://today.yougov.com/international/articles/53298-the-us-navy-deployment-near-venezuela-has-become-even-less-popular
      image: https://ygo-assets-websites-editorial-emea.yougov.net/images/GettyImages-2242705455.original.jpg?pw=1200
      date: "2025-10-31T14:18:58.196487Z"
      categories: [Polling, Politics, Foreign policy, Military]
    
    - title: "Is there a war in American cities?"
      path: https://today.yougov.com/politics/articles/53203-is-there-a-war-in-american-cities
      image: https://ygo-assets-websites-editorial-emea.yougov.net/images/GettyImages-2240388025.original.jpg
      date: "2025-10-17T18:12:49.174338Z"
      categories: [Polling, Experiments, Politics, Military]
    
    - title: "Accounting for taste: 12 food fights that split Americans"
      path: https://today.yougov.com/society/articles/53202-accounting-for-taste-12-food-fights-that-split-americans
      image: https://ygo-assets-websites-editorial-emea.yougov.net/images/GettyImages-2225189195.original.jpg
      date: "2025-10-17T17:25:01.296207Z"
      categories: [Polling, Fun]
    
    - title: "What do Americans think about Trump and Hegseth's meeting with the generals and admirals?"
      path: https://today.yougov.com/politics/articles/53132-poll-trump-hegseth-meeting-generals-admirals-army-war
      image: https://ygo-assets-websites-editorial-emea.yougov.net/images/GettyImages-2238300792.original.jpg
      date: "2025-10-07T20:55:13.600575Z"
      categories: [Polling, Politics, Military]
    
    - title: "What do Americans think of Trump's and Newsom's social media?"
      path: https://today.yougov.com/politics/articles/53111-what-do-americans-think-of-trumps-and-newsoms-social-media
      image: https://ygo-assets-websites-editorial-emea.yougov.net/images/GettyImages-1063020944.original.jpg?pw=1200
      date: "2025-10-03T18:51:33.309877Z"
      categories: [Polling, Politics]
      
    - title: "Majorities say many proposed commemorations of Charlie Kirk go too far"
      path: https://today.yougov.com/politics/articles/53103-majorities-say-many-proposed-commemorations-of-charlie-kirk-go-too-far
      image: https://ygo-assets-websites-editorial-emea.yougov.net/images/GettyImages-487475982.original.jpg
      date: "2025-10-01T14:38:39.468258Z"
      categories: [Polling, Politics, Free speech, Holidays, Money]
    
    - title: "Most Americans disapprove of Trump's handling of free speech and a growing share say rights are eroding"
      path: https://today.yougov.com/politics/articles/53043-most-americans-disapprove-donald-trump-handling-free-speech-growing-share-say-rights-eroding-poll
      image: https://ygo-assets-websites-editorial-emea.yougov.net/images/Jimmy_Kimmel_GettyImages-2236195492_copy.original.jpg
      date: "2025-09-23"
      categories: [Polling, Politics, Free speech]
    
    - title: "Most Americans oppose military involvement in Venezuela"
      path: https://today.yougov.com/politics/articles/52958-most-americans-oppose-military-involvement-in-venezuela-maduro-poll
      image: https://ygo-assets-websites-editorial-emea.yougov.net/images/Navy_GettyImages-179438899_copy.original.jpg
      date: "2025-09-12"
      categories: [Polling, Politics, Foreign policy, Military]
      
    - title: "Concerns about Trump's age and health have grown since the start of his second term"
      path: https://today.yougov.com/politics/articles/52933-concerns-about-trumps-age-and-health-have-grown-since-the-start-of-his-second-term
      image: https://ygo-assets-websites-editorial-emea.yougov.net/images/GettyImages-2232048025.original.jpg
      date: "2025-09-10"
      categories: [Polling, Politics, Age]
    
    - title: "Few Americans want to take over Greenland — most oppose covert operations and military action"
      path: https://today.yougov.com/politics/articles/52879-few-americans-want-to-take-over-greenland-most-oppose-covert-operations-military-action-poll
      image: https://ygo-assets-websites-editorial-emea.yougov.net/images/Greenland_GettyImages-2206689548_copy.original.jpg
      date: "2025-08-31"
      categories: [Polling, Politics, Foreign policy, Greenland]
    
    - title: "After Texas legislators passed redistricting bill, support rises for Democratic counter-gerrymandering"
      path: https://today.yougov.com/politics/articles/52837-after-texas-legislators-passed-redistricting-bill-support-rises-for-democratic-counter-gerrymandering
      image: https://ygo-assets-websites-editorial-emea.yougov.net/images/GettyImages-2230198335.original.jpg
      date: "2025-08-27"
      categories: [Polling, Politics, Gerrymandering]
      
    - title: "Few Americans support Texas Republicans' redistricting plan; opinions are split on the Democrats' move to stop it"
      path: https://today.yougov.com/politics/articles/52756-few-americans-support-texas-republicans-redistricting-plan-gerrymandering-opinions-split-democratic-lawmakers-move-stop-it-poll
      image: https://ygo-assets-websites-editorial-emea.yougov.net/images/Texas_Redistricting_GettyImages-2228953492_copy.original.jpg
      date: "2025-08-12"
      categories: [Polling, Politics, Gerrymandering]
    
    - title: "Large majorities of Americans say gerrymandering is a major problem, unfair, and should be illegal"
      path: https://today.yougov.com/politics/articles/52740-large-majorities-americans-say-gerrymandering-major-problem-unfair-should-be-illegal-redistricting-texas-california-poll
      image: https://ygo-assets-websites-editorial-emea.yougov.net/images/Gerrymandering_GettyImages-1138412200_copy.original.jpg
      date: "2025-08-08"
      categories: [Polling, Politics, Gerrymandering]
      
    - title: "Many Americans would like to raise the driving age and lower the drinking age"
      path: https://today.yougov.com/society/articles/52671-many-americans-would-like-to-raise-the-driving-age-and-lower-the-drinking-age
      image: https://ygo-assets-websites-editorial-emea.yougov.net/images/GettyImages-802236882.original.jpg
      date: "2025-07-28T14:21:00-04:00"
      categories: [Polling, Age]
    
    - title: "Most Americans don’t want to lower the voting age, but they do want younger presidents"
      path: https://today.yougov.com/politics/articles/52670-most-americans-dont-want-to-lower-the-voting-age-but-they-do-want-younger-presidents
      image: https://ygo-assets-websites-editorial-emea.yougov.net/images/GettyImages-1588099130.original.jpg
      date: "2025-07-28T12:31:00-04:00"
      categories: [Polling, Politics, Age]
    
    - title: "Young American adults challenge the conventional wisdom on tooth removal"
      path: https://today.yougov.com/society/articles/52483-young-american-adults-challenge-the-conventional-wisdom-on-tooth-removal
      image: https://ygo-assets-websites-editorial-emea.yougov.net/images/GettyImages-1303223544.original.jpg
      date: "2025-07-03"
      categories: [Polling, Age]
    
    - title: "Most Americans support Russia sanctions; many support sanctioning countries that buy Russian oil"
      path: https://today.yougov.com/politics/articles/52453-most-americans-support-russia-sanctions-many-support-sanctioning-countries-buy-russian-oil-gas-poll
      image: https://ygo-assets-websites-editorial-emea.yougov.net/images/Russia_Ukraine_war_GettyImages-1459651125_copy.original.jpg
      date: "2025-06-27"
      categories: [Polling, Politics, Foreign policy]
      
    - title: "Who would Americans like to see on their money?"
      path: https://today.yougov.com/consumer/articles/51975-who-would-americans-like-to-see-on-their-money
      image: https://ygo-assets-websites-editorial-emea.yougov.net/images/GettyImages-1327342315.original.jpg
      date: "2025-04-08"
      categories: [Polling, Money, History, Fun]
      
    - title: "More Americans want to drop the penny than to save it"
      path: https://today.yougov.com/economy/articles/51865-more-americans-want-to-drop-the-penny-than-to-save-it
      image: https://ygo-assets-websites-editorial-emea.yougov.net/images/GettyImages-1396258258.original.jpg
      date: "2025-03-20"
      categories: [Polling, Politics, Money]
      
    - title: "What do Americans think about immigrants? It depends on how you ask"
      path: https://today.yougov.com/politics/articles/51846-what-americans-think-about-immigrants-depends-on-how-you-ask-poll
      image: https://ygo-assets-websites-editorial-emea.yougov.net/images/immigration_GettyImages-1187191536_copy.original.jpg
      date: "2025-03-18"
      categories: [Polling, Experiments, Politics, Immigration]
      
    - title: "Support for women serving in military combat roles is widespread and growing"
      path: https://today.yougov.com/politics/articles/51835-support-for-women-military-combat-roles-widespread-growing-poll
      image: https://ygo-assets-websites-editorial-emea.yougov.net/images/women_in_military_GettyImages-1493024059_copy.original.jpg
      date: "2025-03-17"
      categories: [Polling, Politics, Gender, Military]
      
    - title: "After the election, Americans say they would have been less likely to vote for other Democrats than Harris in a matchup with Trump"
      path: https://today.yougov.com/politics/articles/50998-after-the-election-voters-less-likely-to-vote-for-other-democrats-than-harris
      image: https://ygo-assets-websites-editorial-emea.yougov.net/images/GettyImages-2166913421.original.jpg
      date: "2024-11-25"
      categories: [Polling, Politics, Elections]
      
    - title: "Two-thirds of Americans say Hitler was completely bad; 20% think Trump would say the same"
      path: https://today.yougov.com/politics/articles/50864-two-thirds-of-americans-say-hitler-was-completely-bad
      image: https://ygo-assets-websites-editorial-emea.yougov.net/images/GettyImages-2181408266.original.jpg
      date: "2024-10-31"
      categories: [Polling, Politics, Elections, History]
      
    - title: "Americans think candidates should pay cities' costs of hosting their rallies"
      path: https://today.yougov.com/politics/articles/50849-americans-think-candidates-should-pay-cities-costs-of-hosting-their-rallies
      image: https://ygo-assets-websites-editorial-emea.yougov.net/images/GettyImages-2182002244.original.jpg
      date: "2024-10-31"
      categories: [Polling, Politics, Elections]
      
    - title: "Americans are increasingly concerned about Donald Trump’s age and fitness for office"
      path: https://today.yougov.com/politics/articles/50808-americans-are-increasingly-concerned-about-donald-trumps-age-and-fitness-for-office
      image: https://ygo-assets-websites-editorial-emea.yougov.net/images/GettyImages-2179409248.original.jpg
      date: "2024-10-25"
      categories: [Polling, Politics, Elections, Age]
      
    - title: "Has Leif Erikson come out of Christopher Columbus' shadow?"
      path: https://today.yougov.com/society/articles/50683-has-leif-erikson-come-out-of-christopher-columbus-shadow
      image: https://ygo-assets-websites-editorial-emea.yougov.net/images/GettyImages-655082963.original.jpg
      date: "2024-10-11T20:49:00-04:00"
      categories: [Polling, Politics, Holidays, History, Greenland]
      
    - title: "Christopher Columbus and Columbus Day divide Americans"
      path: https://today.yougov.com/society/articles/50681-christopher-columbus-and-columbus-day-divide-americans
      image: https://ygo-assets-websites-editorial-emea.yougov.net/images/GettyImages-169961077_lm03usQ.original.jpg
      date: "2024-10-11T20:47:00-04:00"
      categories: [Polling, Politics, Holidays, History]
    
    - title: "More Americans support federal observance of Indigenous Peoples’ Day than of Columbus Day"
      path: https://today.yougov.com/society/articles/50682-more-americans-support-federal-observance-of-indigenous-peoples-day-than-columbus-day
      image: https://ygo-assets-websites-editorial-emea.yougov.net/images/GettyImages-859128590.original.jpg
      date: "2024-10-11T20:46:00-04:00"
      categories: [Polling, Politics, Holidays]
      
    - title: "What’s up with Gen Z’s socks?"
      path: https://today.yougov.com/society/articles/50258-whats-up-with-gen-zs-socks
      image: https://ygo-assets-websites-editorial-emea.yougov.net/images/GettyImages-95589596.original.jpg
      date: "2024-08-06"
      categories: [Polling, Fun, Age]
    
    - title: "Men do spend more time than women thinking about the Roman Empire — and World War II"
      path: https://today.yougov.com/politics/articles/47481-men-women-thinking-about-the-roman-empire-poll
      image: https://ygo-assets-websites-editorial-emea.yougov.net/images/roman-empire.original.jpg
      date: "2023-10-03"
      categories: [Polling, Fun, History, Gender]
  
  sort: "date desc"
  type: default
  categories: true
  sort-ui: false
  filter-ui: false
page-layout: full
title-block-banner: true
---
